docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY WESTPHAL, KIERA AS TO DEFENDANT BERKELHANNER, BETH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
